title: Beef Cubes 1kg 100% Beef 100% Natural Dog Chews Treats Training Aid LOS
features: HIGHLY RECOMMENDED – At Maltbys Stores, we're a family of dog lovers (which is why we all have dogs ourselves!) so we know when it comes to finding treats for your own furry friends, you're looking for something that's not only great tasting but also helps to promote your pet's health and wellbeing. Choosing natural treats is a great choice for your dog as they are generally lower in fat and higher in protein than most processed dog treats, and what’s more, dogs love them too!

A CHOICE THAT'S GREAT FOR EVERYONE – Our 100% natural range of dog treats are derived from the by-products of the meat industry that would otherwise go to waste. This means that choosing natural treats is not only a great choice for your dog, but also fantastic for the environment.

100% NATURAL – All of our dog treats are kept in their entirely natural form, with absolutely no added colours, flavours or preservatives that might not be so good for your dog's digestion. They are all air-dried from raw to retain their vital nutrients and, most importantly for your dog, their delicious smells and flavours too!

QUALITY WE ARE PROUD OF – Maltbys Stores have been a family run business since 1904, and during that time we have always tried to provide our customers with the best quality products for their pets at the fairest prices. So whether you're little loved ones happen to have fur, feathers, or even scales, we're bound to have something for you! Visit our Amazon store to browse our full range of products, or feel free to contact us if you have any questions we can answer.

PLEASE NOTE: This product has been packaged and stored in a facility where it may have come into contact with common allergens, including peanuts, milk, egg, wheat and fish products. This is a supplementary animal food product, intended to be used as part of a balanced diet. Maltbys Stores 1904 Ltd do not sell any products that are intended for human consumption.
description: Product Description A family run business for over 115 years A heritage we are proud of Beginning as a specialist retailer of bird seeds, we have expanded our product range over the years and now offer a comprehensive selection of animal feeds, wild bird foods, dog treats, garden supplies and fishing products. Our Story Maltbys' Stores is a pet and garden supplies retailer based in Hull, UK. Since opening in 1904, we have always aimed to provide our customers with the best quality products we can find. Now in our sixth family generation, we are still continuing to look for new ways to provide fantastic products to you and your pets. We know your animal's needs are very important, which is why we continue to work with our suppliers to find the freshest and best quality products available. Specialists in wild bird foods and feeders Huge range of natural dog treats and chews Fishing pellets, baits, ingredients and liquids Garden supplies, including grass seeds Huge selection of foods for aviary birds, poultry, pigeons, pond fish and more Most people want to give their dogs occasional treats, either to boost their health, help with training or just as a tasty snack! Dogs often need treats to help them maintain a balanced diet, but it can be hard to find treats that are healthy, natural and free from unnecessary added preservatives. At Maltby's Stores we have worked hard to source a range of natural dog treats. Mostly comprised of natural by-products from the meat, fish and poultry industries, these are not only a healthier option to processed dog treats but are also great if you are looking for a more sustainable alternative. Why it's Important to Choose Natural Treats for Your Dog A Balanced Diet Natural treats are great for providing a balanced diet for your dog. They are generally higher in protein and fibre and lower in fat than processed dog treats. They can also help aid in digestion, as they are free from additives and filler content that can be fattening for dogs. This makes them a great option for dogs on a strict diet, as they will provide the satisfaction of other treats with fewer calories. Wholesome and Nutritional Natural treats are free from added hormones and antibodies, which, when present in other treats, can cause a harmful buildup in your dog that can lead to hyperactivity, weakened immune system and a range of other health conditions. Generally natural treats are also less likely to cause an allergic reaction in your dog as they are free from added allergens, such as gluten. Promoting Health Aside from not containing added chemicals or sweeteners that can be harmful to your dog's teeth, natural treats can actively help to improve your dog's oral health and hygiene. The act of chewing natural treats helps to break down plaque, tartar and dirt that can accumulate in your dog's mouth, and help develop teeth as they grow. Some treats are also great for promoting a healthy skin and coat, particularly fish treats. Improved Wellbeing The act of chewing dog treats is great for keeping your dog engaged, improving their mental wellbeing and reducing stress. They also don't cause irritation like highly processed treats can, maintaining a healthy balance between your dog's digestive system, brain and heart. This increases your dog's energy, develops stronger immunity, lowers the risk of certain diseases, and generally keeps your dog happy and healthy. Meaty Cubes for Dogs Why Choose Meaty Cubes? Meaty cubes are an entirely natural dog treat product made of 100% dried meat. Entirely free of grains, wheat, gluten and additives, the cubes are air dried and then chopped into small pieces which are chewier than some other products, meaning they are great for use as a training treat or to carry in your pocket on walks. Product Variations Approximate size per chew 0.5-1cm square Approximate quantity per 1kg 60-100 pieces Available sizes 200g, 500g, 1kg Available Flavours: Beef, Boar, Chicken, Deer, Doe, Duck, Goose, Lamb, Rabbit, Turkey, plus our Mixed Flavours variety Check out our Natural Treats Range We sell a broad range of natural treats for dogs, including those derived from by-products of: Beef Pork Chicken Duck Fish Browse our range for full information on all of our products. A complementary pet food product for dogs. To be used as part of a balanced diet. Please note: any product information, including indications of size, colour, flavour, texture or general appearance, are approximations only. As this is a 100% natural product, these variables can alter largely from batch to batch. Any images shown are for demonstrative purposes only; actual product may differ in appearance. Directions for use: always monitor your dog when using natural chews, and ensure there is a supply of fresh water available. If you have any queries or concerns we would always recommend consulting your vet before feeding your dog natural treats.
